difficulty_note: A sharper Rocket patrol fight that teaches the hideout is now a dungeon, but default difficulty remains mainline-hard rather than Radical Red punishing.

player_side.story_support: Red blocks the corridor so the B2F patrol cannot alert the lower floors while Antman battles.

slots.role: smoke-screen control and hideout hazard clue

opponent.intent: block the Lift Key route, protect the stolen Silph Scope crate, and show Rocket responding to Gold Dust and Moonlight interference
